backend/main.mo: Defines types and authorization-guarded logic for profiles, jobs, and applications, including CRUD operations and state storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing frontend file purposes across styling, routing, hooks, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Empty stylesheet placeholder for global frontend styles.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component handling auth flow, profile checks, routing, and page rendering within AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/applications/App: Dialog component letting workers submit a cover letter and apply to a job.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button using Internet Identity with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/common/QueryStat: Wrapper component displaying loading, error, empty, or content states for queries.
frontend/src/components/jobs/CreateJobDi: Dialog form for creating a job, managing input state and submitting via useCreateJob.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobCard.tsx: Displays a job summary card with title, description, status, and links to job detail.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Provides the main app layout with top navigation, content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders footer with branding links and copyright info.
frontend/src/components/layout/TopNav.ts: Navigation bar showing links based on user profile and login status.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileC: Displays a user's profile info with optional email and role badge.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: Form for new users to enter name, email, area, and profile type, saving via useSaveCallerProfile.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/useApplicatio: Hooks for fetching applications, applying to jobs, and updating application status with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/useCallerCont: Hooks for fetching the caller's user role and profile via actor queries.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/useJobs.ts: Hooks for job search, job creation, and updating job area with query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/useProfiles.t: Hooks to fetch and save user profiles, including lookup by principal ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages creation of backend actor based on identity and refreshes dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackend.ts: Provides backend actor state and authentication status using useActor and Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity login state, identity loading, and authentication actions using AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind layers and CSS variables for light and dark themes, applying base styling and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseJobsPage.tsx: Implements a job browsing page with filters and search, displaying results via JobCard components and QueryState.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed job information, poster profile, and application actions, using multiple queries and conditional UI states.
frontend/src/pages/MyApplicationsPage.ts: Shows the logged-in worker’s job applications with status badges and job info, handling loading and access restrictions.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Renders a simple 404 page with messaging and a button linking back to the jobs page.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Provides view and edit functionality for the user's profile, with form fields, validation, and save/cancel actions.
frontend/src/pages/ProviderJobsPage.tsx: Renders the provider’s job management page, validating provider role and listing jobs with create functionality and query state handling.
frontend/src/pages/PublicProfilePage.tsx: Loads and displays a public user profile with back navigation and query-state management.
frontend/src/router/routes.ts: Defines route constants and helper functions for building hash-based navigation paths.
frontend/src/router/useHashRouter.ts: Implements a simple hash-based router hook that parses the current route and parameters and provides a navigate helper.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from query strings and hash routes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom colors, themes, animations, plugins, and content paths.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata including version, feature list, architecture notes, and pending feature requests.
